content.en:
"Get out!"

Ye Tian said to Lord Wuheng.

"Yes!"

Lord Wuheng hurriedly responded.

He didn't dare to stay here, otherwise if Ye Tian wanted to kill him, he wouldn't be able to resist at all, the difference in strength between the two was too big.

Wow!

The Lord of Impermanence departed, disappearing into the area along with the other members of the Imperpeent Holy Land.

The Impermanence Holy Land is not limited to this one territory, but also controls many territories, so it can choose an ordinary treasure land to settle in as the headquarters of the Imperpetual Holy Land.

Although doing so would cause the Immortal Holy Land to lose face and lose its prestige, completely falling from the First Holy Land of the Infinite Sea to the Second Holy Land, it could at least be preserved.

......

"The Wuliang Mountain is too big, and it's boring for me to stay here alone, so I informed that there is really no holy place, and I will set up my headquarters here in the future. "

Ye Tian decided.

Other than that.

He was also ready to relocate some of the Terrans to this area, after all, this was the treasure land he had obtained, and he could naturally arrange it himself.

Immediately, he informed the Lord of the Word.

Wow!

The Lord of the Dark Word came here, and the other Legendary Realm Lords also came, and when they saw the changes in the Infinite Mountain, they were immediately shocked.

"Endless Leader 16 Lords, what's going on here?

The Stygian Lord was surprised.

Ye Tian said with a smile: "The Wuheng Holy Land has been relocated, in the future, this place will be the headquarters of the True No Holy Land, the Infinite 1l is a rare treasure land, much better than the True No Holy Land of the True No Holy Land." "

"What, the Holy Land of Impermanence has moved?"

The other Legendary Realm Lords were shocked.

They are not stupid, naturally they will not think that the Wuheng Holy Land is that they have given up the Wuliang Mountain, the treasure land of the Wuliang Mountain is the most precious treasure land of the Wuliang Sea, and it is said that even some peak Legendary Realm lords want such a treasure land.

"Endless Lord, what kind of strength are you now, Lord Wuheng would actually give up Wuliang Mountain, with his character, it is impossible to give up easily, it must be that the strength is far inferior to yours, and even endangered his life. The Lord of the Word said.

"I've created a space-time supreme skill!

Ye Tian said simply.

As soon as these words came out, the Lord of the Dark Word was shocked.

created the space-time supreme technique, which already clearly informed Ye Tian's strength.

"The third level of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord"

The Lord of the Shadow was very unbelievable, Ye Tian had obviously reached the peak of the Legendary Realm Lord behind him, and he was still at the first level, and he had not yet reached the second level.

Now, Ye Tian has stepped into the second level and reached the third level.

She's really stimulated!

"Hahaha, Wu1 Mountain actually belongs to our True Infinite Holy Land, I will go and inform you that the True Sacred Land has been relocated to Infinite Mountain. Lord Longgu said excitedly.

"Yes, notify me immediately!"

One by one, the Lords of the Legendary Realm took action

In just one day, the relocation was completely completed plus a series of planning issues.

And the rest of the matter, there is no need for Ye Tian to deal with it, he came to the Infinite Tree, sealed this place, and did not allow other Legendary Realm lords to approach.

The entire Infinite Mountain was occupied by him, so he occupied the Infinite Tree, and no one dared to oppose it, nor did the Lord of the Dark Words.

"The Immeasurable Fruit has not yet been born, an eternal era has given birth to an Immeasurable Fruit, and the previous Immeasurable Fruit has been picked by the Lord of Impermanence. Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he went to the immeasurable heaven and earth again.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian descended on the Infinite Heaven and Earth and immediately felt the special nature of this piece of Heaven and Earth.

He began to practice the top supreme technique in this piece of heaven and earth, trying to create a top supreme skill, which was not very difficult for him, and in the process of creating the drill, this piece of heaven and earth was invisibly assisting him, allowing him to produce a correct guide.

For example, if he makes a mistake in the drill, this piece of the world will make him feel that it is wrong to do so, and how to succeed in the drill.

"Interesting, with such heaven and earth assistance, if I go to create the highest skill of time and space, the difficulty will be reduced by at least ten times or more. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He now felt that Lord Wuheng was really a waste material, and with such a treasure land assistance, he hadn't even created a second top-notch supreme technique.

Next.

Ye Tian's body has been practicing the time-space supreme technique in the immeasurable heaven and earth of the Infinite Mountain, and practicing the time-space supreme technique here will not affect the immeasurable heaven and earth in the slightest, so it will not affect the members of the True Infinite Holy Land.

......

Wuliang Mountain, Tianlan Islands.

Lord Impermanence has brought the members of the Imperpeent Holy Land here, which was originally a territory of the Imperpeent Holy Land, and is now chosen as the headquarters of the Imperpeent Holy Land.

Soon, the Impermanence Holy Land had completely built its headquarters here and stabilized.

However, Lord Impermanence's mood was difficult to stabilize.

"Endless Lord, it's too much of a deception!"

Lord Wuheng was furious.

But he didn't dare to trouble Ye Tian, because he couldn't beat him.

However, he vowed that if he had the opportunity in the future, he would take revenge.

-

Infinite Mountain, Infinite Heaven and Earth.

Ye Tian continued to comprehend here, and soon half an eternal era passed.

On this day, there was movement on the side of the immeasurable tree, and an immeasurable fruit was born.

Ye Tian picked this immeasurable fruit for the first time, swallowed it in one gulp, and slowly refined it.

As the Infinite Fruit was refined, Ye Tian found that his comprehension had increased a little bit by 693, although it was very weak, but it was indeed improved, and his will was also slowly refined, and the effect was okay.

Moreover, when the immeasurable fruit is effective, you can take the opportunity to practice the creation of space-time supreme skills, and the effect will be much better.

"The effect of one immeasurable fruit is still average, wait for the next time you pick multiple immeasurable fruits, let's take it together. Ye Tian decided.

In the following years, he continued to create and practice the second space-time supreme technique, and reaped immeasurable fruits.

Unconsciously, five hundred eternal years had passed, and Ye Tian had also obtained five hundred immeasurable fruits.

this day.

Ye Tian swallowed all the five hundred immeasurable fruits in one go, and the endless energy burst out, all of which were refined by Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's will was rapidly refining and improving, and his comprehension was temporarily improved a lot, and countless spiritual lights appeared, which was of great help to him in creating the supreme technique of time and space.

Moreover, Ye Tian himself was almost close to creating a second space-time supreme technique.

Ye Tian's other copy body entered the sacrificial circle of the Black Saint Mountain again, and took advantage of the space-time fusion there to comprehend.

The Black Holy Mountain sacrificial array, immeasurable fruit, immeasurable heaven and earth......

After the combination of many factors, Ye Tian finally succeeded in creating the second space-time supreme technique after spending a period of time. _
